mnemonics: Geth & Nethermind (G&N) are the main clients, like 'Guns N' Roses' - the main rock band. Remember them to keep the network 'rocking'.
keyPoints: Ethereum has multiple client software implementations like Geth (Go-Ethereum) and Nethermind (.NET).
Clients must follow the core protocol rules to stay in consensus with the network.
Releases are named after famous developers and follow a hard fork schedule to implement upgrades.
commonMistakes: Assuming there is only one 'official' Ethereum client software.
Confusing client software (like Geth) with the Ethereum protocol itself.
Thinking a hard fork is always a contentious chain split; most are planned, non-contentious upgrades.
